response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for 'テトリス' and '絶対アイドル辞めないで'. For 'ふれ・れ・どぅ・しー・でい', on-screen lyrics and audio were used as the primary source as the JSON provided null values. Subtitles are strictly timed to the vocal performances, ensuring alignment with the fast-paced sections in 'テトリス' and the melodic phrasing in the other songs. On-screen text was used for disambiguation of stylized lyrics.
